etymology.description: 檢(檢) (jiǎn, "inspect") combines a hand holding a document—depicting careful examination of records, with 蔣, suggesting a phonetic component. 查(查) (chá, "search") shows trees under a roof, representing the idea of thorough searching, as in plucking through branches.
etymology.interpretation: 檢(檢) (jiǎn, "inspect") involves scrutinizing details closely, which naturally extends to 'examine'. 查(查) (chá, "search") suggests looking carefully through a space or collection, complementing the idea of examination. Together, 檢查(檢查) represents looking over something thoroughly for oversight or problems, seamlessly combining precise inspection and methodical searching.

examples.chinese: 医生在医院检查病人(醫生在醫院檢查病人)。
examples.english: The doctor examines patients at the hospital.

examples.chinese: 他们需要检查设备是否正常(他們需要檢查設備是否正常)。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen xūyào jiǎnchá shèbèi shìfǒu zhèngcháng.
examples.english: They need to examine if the equipment is functioning properly.

examples.chinese: 在这个时候(在這個時候)，我们必须仔细检查每个细节(我們必須仔細檢查每個細節)。
examples.pinyin: Zài zhège shíhòu, wǒmen bìxū zǐxì jiǎnchá měi gè xìjié.
examples.english: At this time, we must carefully examine every detail.
